tiles.question: 2026-05-09 Keel deep build — model quality snapshot
tiles.answer: DeepSeek v4-pro: BEST for formal theory, literature synthesis, unified equations. DeepSeek v4-flash: BEST for implementation, coding across 3 languages, fast iteration. Seed-2.0-mini (proxy): BEST for creative breadth, divergent thinking, reverse-actualization. GLM-5.1: coding API works but needs OpenClaw routing fix. Claude Code: interactive only, not autonomous. Summary: v4-flash for implementation, v4-pro for theory, Seed for creativity — use all three in parallel for maximum coverage.
